active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
cautions: This PASS supports the phase-8 promotion-gate decision, not benchmark promotion.
LoCoMo remains the controlling bottleneck at 30/50 with retrieval and answer-use failures.
The old work/phase-8/reviews/codex-review.md is stale and must not be used as current ACK evidence.
